title: Our campaigns - Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats
headings: h2: Lisa Smart and the local Lib Dem team working hard for our communities
h2: Specialist status for Stepping Hill
text_excerpt: Our campaigns - Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats Vote Lib Dem Get involved Local news Our campaigns Campaign wins Lisa Smart MP Our local teams Our party Contact Donate Join Donate Join Get involved Get emails Display a poster Andrew Stunell Fund Our campaigns Protect Our Community Park at Tangshutt Fields An additional hospital for Stockport NHS dentists Fair adoption pay Save our green belt Community-led housing Stop sewage Marple's World Heritage Speed Camera Campaign Illegal off-road biking Save Hazel Grove's NatWest Branch Save post office services in High Lane Save Stockport Post Office Campaign wins Specialist status for Stepping Hill Save our ticket offices Offerton fire crews saved New leisure hub for Marple Preserve the Green Belt Save Central Library Preserving Chadkirk Chapel Saving the 375 bus Rail services on the Rose Hill line Our local teams Bredbury & Woodley Bredbury Green & Romiley Hazel Grove Manor Marple North Marple South & High Lane Norbury & Woodsmoor Offerton Our party What we stand for Get updates Our campaigns Lisa Smart and the local Lib Dem team working hard for our communities An additional hospital for Stockport Offerton fire crews saved New leisure hub for Marple Save our ticket offices Rail services on the Rose Hill line As Liberal Democrats we believe in working with communities and involving them in the decisions that shape their communities and lives. If you would like to help out on any of our campaigns beyond signing petitions then please get in touch.
